channel.title: Mercury Recovery Field Notes
channel.description: Independent field notes on mercury remediation, water security, ASGM cleanup, and tailings recovery.

item.title: Seven Questions To Ask Before Funding Mercury Remediation
item.description: A practical checklist for mercury remediation funders evaluating capture, verification, community safety, and long-term land outcomes.

item.title: Why Artisanal Mining Cleanup Has To Include Water Security
item.description: Mercury cleanup in artisanal mining regions is stronger when paired with aquifer protection and reliable community water infrastructure.

item.title: From Tailings Liability To Regeneration Asset
item.description: A field-note framework for converting mine tailings cleanup into land restoration, water protection, and future-use planning.
